name: Torre Vella – open-air yoga and massage (Fontenille)
description: Across 200 hectares of nature among olive trees, vines and cliffs, Torre Vella offers yoga and meditation beneath the holm oaks and open-air massage tables facing the sea. Estate wellbeing, free of noise, with the Santa Ponsa spa ten minutes away.

highlights: Daily yoga and meditation beneath holm oaks and olive trees
Open-air massage facing the cliffs, with natural products
A wellbeing programme: a yoga class plus a body treatment plus an aperitif on the cliff
